meta.title: Pavel Mikheyev - CV
meta.description: CV of Pavel Mikheyev, Machine Learning Engineer and Data Scientist.

about.name: Mikheyev Pavel Olegovich
about.summary: ML/DS engineer with an applied-mathematics foundation and a backend background. My edge is combining research with production: an original clustering algorithm (Intelliant, on PyPI) and data-centric VLM fine-tuning on one side, pipelines over hundreds of thousands of records and FastAPI services on the other. Research-minded; preparing for a PhD in ML.
about.research: graph-based clustering of embeddings via ant colony optimization (ACO): finding dense semantic cores and multilevel hierarchical clustering

achievements: Independently led two internal projects in parallel with my master's studies
Real estate aggregator: parsing and processing of 300k+ listings, location hierarchy, recommendations, served via FastAPI
Initiated the migration from Pandas to Polars (memory and speed on large tables)
End-to-end SAM 3D Body pipeline: from dissecting the model to video adaptation and a Gradio interface
Desktop viewer for SAM 3D Body results on Rerun and PySide; shown to investors, used by the team
Merged listings from two sources (~200k) by building ID and title similarity
Location hierarchy and its reconciliation across sources for autocomplete and recommendations
Filtering, parsing, and analysis of dataframes in Pandas (project was sold)
Thesis project: research on image alt-text generation, training VisualBERT on Conceptual Captions (3.3M pairs)
Architecture experiments: ResNet50 + BERT, GPT-2 as a decoder
Comparative analysis of approaches built on Gemini and Cloud Vision
Editing the corporate map of Simferopol on Yandex Maps: infrastructure objects
Annotation via the Yandex Maps API and a Python script, partly by hand

projects.name: Intelliant
projects.description: An original ant-colony clustering algorithm: a KNN graph over embeddings, search for dense semantic cores. Numba and sparse matrices, published on PyPI, 56 tests. The basis of my master's thesis and planned PhD work.

projects.name: WCAG Caption Research
projects.description: Data-centric fine-tuning of a compact VLM for Russian WCAG image captions: CC3M clustering via Intelliant, Teacher-VLM relabeling, LoRA fine-tuning of Qwen2.5-VL-7B. Finding: 10k representative samples match the loss of 32k.

projects.name: ThermalVis of Indoor Environments
projects.description: 3D visualization of indoor temperature distribution from wall temperatures: two value sets with a shared color range and adjustable surface opacity.

projects.name: Simple Pizza
projects.description: Console app for managing a pizzeria: menu, ingredients, recipes and orders, with automatic stock deduction and pizza visibility control.

projects.name: Untitled Text Game
projects.description: A text-based game in Java: moving between locations, items, inventory, and NPC interaction.

projects.name: SAM 3D Body
projects.description: Tooling for running the SAM 3D Body model (Meta) locally: CLI for batch dataset processing, a Gradio demo, and setup/debug scripts. Fork of the original repo.

projects.name: Logic and architecture of compute environments
projects.description: Course tasks on parallel computing in C/C++: single- and multi-threaded matrix multiplication, producer-consumer synchronization, recursive parallelism.

projects.name: Computer Networks
projects.description: Course tasks on networking and concurrency in Java: quadratic equations, UDP sockets, chat, and client-server applications.

projects.name: SAM 3D Viewer
projects.description: Desktop app for viewing 3D body reconstruction results from the SAM 3D Body neural network: synchronized RGB frames, meshes, and skeletons in Rerun.

projects.name: Italian Listings Viewer
projects.description: Web app for browsing Italian real-estate listings: Google Drive sync, location hierarchy, filters, and autocomplete.

Математика, информатика, компьютерные науки, моделирование, образование (МИКМО-2025)

achievements.text: I.V. Kurchatov scholarship of the State Council of the Republic of Crimea

achievements: Scholarship of the Council of Ministers of the Republic of Crimea (twice)

achievements.text: Diploma from V.I. Vernadsky Crimean Federal University for outstanding achievements in research, 2026
Letter of appreciation from the Institute of Physics and Technology (CFU) for outstanding achievements in research
Named in the Honor Book of best graduates of V.I. Vernadsky Crimean Federal University, 2026
Participant of the "Kadry.Krym: Start in Public Service" educational intensive (Meganom Academy, 2026)
